calendar.matters:
Petition For Breach Of Trust, For Orders To Return Trust Property, Determine Validity Of Trust Amendment, Impose Constructive Trust, And To Instruct
Off Calendar Feb-27-2017 Off Calendar

Petition For Breach Of Trust, For Orders To Return Trust Property, Determine Validity Of Trust Amendment, Impose Constructive Trust, And To Instruct
Off Calendar Sep-26-2016 Continued To Feb-27-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Graham Dowds for (petitioner) Linda Jue. Edward Thirkell for (respondents) Hanley Lau & David Lau.

The Court stated that it needs courtesy copies. Mr. Thirkell reported that they were mailed on 9/13/16, that they contacted the Court to let them know, that the copies were not endorsed stamped as they were not aware of the practice in San Francisco. The Court stated that the examiner has not seen the opposition. Mr. Thirkell stated that the parties have agreed to mediation on December 19, 2016 and request that this matter be continued until after mediation. The Court stated that it will still need endorsed filed copies. Mr. Dowd asked if the Court had received the proposed order and was told yes. Mr. Thirkell requested that the continuance be after February 13, 2017. The Petition for Breach of Trust, etc., was continued to February 27, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)
